mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification (user_id, type, title, content, related_id, is_read, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{content}, #{relatedId}, #{isRead}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM notification WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE notification SET is_read = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE notification SET is_read = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
SELECT * FROM notification ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM notification ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
